---
title: "tutorial 1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
install.packages("network")
install.packages("igraph")
install.packages("reshape2")
install.packages("tidyverse")
library(network)
library(igraph)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}

```
